flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Riverland Community College fell 12% between 2006 and 2009 (45.5% → 40.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Riverland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Riverland Community College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($14.5k → $12.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Riverland Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (66.8% → 74.9%).
